title: Keeper Profile — Mira Eggwarden

panels.description: Character profile plate: Mira Eggwarden portrait in hatchery mentor portrait — Compact robes, soft braid, satchel; empty text zones.

bubbles.text: MIRA EGGWARDEN — Hatchery mentor. Bond philosophy: keep, don't own. Compact first. Refuses to treat companions as weapons even when the Meridian calls them inventory.

transcript: NARRATION: MIRA EGGWARDEN — Hatchery mentor. Bond philosophy: keep, don't own. Compact first. Refuses to treat companions as weapons even when the Meridian calls them inventory.
